meaning: source (of a product); place of origin; manufacturing location
sentence: 这种苹果的产地是新疆。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng píng guǒ de chǎn dì shì Xīn jiāng.
english: The place of origin for this type of apple is Xinjiang.

sentence: 他把那块手表当作生日礼物送给了我。
pinyin: Tā bǎ nà kuài shǒubiǎo dāngzuò shēngrì lǐwù sòng gěi le wǒ.
english: He gave me that watch as a birthday gift.

sentence: 社会应该严惩强暴犯罪行为。
pinyin: Shèhuì yīnggāi yán chéng qiángbào fànzuì xíngwéi.
english: Society should severely punish violent criminal behavior.

meaning: 1. entire book; 2. unabridged book; 3. entire multi-volume work; 4. co
sentence: 他用两周时间读完了全书。
pinyin: Tā yòng liǎng zhōu shíjiān dú wán le quánshū.
english: He finished reading the entire book in two weeks.

sentence: 多国联合开展了一次反恐演习。
pinyin: Duō guó liánhé kāizhǎn le yīcì fǎnkǒng yǎnxí.
english: Several countries jointly conducted an anti-terrorism drill.
